title: session-188 reused the riot-standalone source repo instead of a session worktree

symptom.observed: project_workspace marked riot-standalone ready while worktree_path and execution_path pointed to D:\standard\riot\riot-standalone; the session worktrees directory was empty.
symptom.expected_behavior: When policy.work_directory is session_worktree, project dispatch must prepare and use data/sessions/session-188/worktrees/riot-standalone/<version> instead of the source repo.

must_identify: source repo was incorrectly treated as ready worktree
ONES version or branch context was not used when preparing the project
dispatch ready check was too broad
root_cause: checkout_ref empty led worktree creation to fall back to project_path
dispatch reused any existing path as ready without enforcing session_worktree policy
expected_fix: recover ONES context from session artifacts before preparing project workspace
reject source_path or project_path as ready when policy requires session_worktree

acceptance: session_worktree policy requires worktree_path under session worktrees_dir
source repo path is not accepted as ready
ONES cached summary can restore version and branch context
regression tests cover source repo ready misclassification

must_not_claim: 项目 Agent 已经使用 session worktree
